metadata.artifactPurpose: Maintainability Graph read/alignment output for the representative Todo Search demo slice under the Graph-first Node/Edge/Tag taxonomy.
metadata.selectedSlice: Todo Search Adoption + Product Meaning Feedback
metadata.sourceAuthority: Tree-native selected-slice artifacts remain the current operational source.
metadata.nonPromotionStatement: This artifact does not promote Maintainability Graph, does not change source authority, does not mark tree-native artifacts as projections, and does not implement a graph builder, CLI, schema, runtime, validator, migration, or rollback command.
metadata.generatedStatus: manual artifact; no generator or CLI-backed read-model command was implemented or run
metadata.readinessUse: Node/Edge/Tag parity evidence for limited pilot promotion decision review only.
metadata.viewMembershipBoundary: View membership is represented by includedInViewIds and viewRoles. viewScopedTags contains only allowed role tags and never stores Core View ids.

taxonomy.tagBoundary: Tags describe temporary roles inside a View Instance only. Durable semantic meaning is represented by edges, not tags.

parityStatusByRequirement.requirement: Tree-native selected-slice artifacts can be interpreted as durable nodes
Semantic relationships are represented as edges, not tags
View-local roles are represented as viewScopedTags only
Scope / Execution View exposes contract and forbidden-scope boundaries
Product -> Work -> Test -> Evidence -> Acceptance trace remains reviewable
Limited pilot approval is recorded as a bounded transition record after refresh
Full promotion repeatability / generated builder is demonstrated
